mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, parent_comment_id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, create_date, modified_date FROM `comment` WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_comment_id, id) ASC, parent_comment_id IS NOT NULL ASC, create_date ASC
SELECT id, post_id, parent_comment_id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, create_date, modified_date FROM `comment` WHERE id = #{commentId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `comment` WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `comment` (post_id, parent_comment_id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, is_deleted, create_date, modified_date) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{visibilityLevel}, 'partial'), #{confirm}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: UPDATE `comment` SET is_deleted = 1, modified_date = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND (id = #{commentId} OR parent_comment_id = #{commentId}) AND (#{isAdmin} = TRUE OR user_id = #{userId} OR parent_comment_id = #{commentId}) AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE `comment` SET is_deleted = 1, modified_date = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
